channel.title: Posts on Banjo's Backyard Farm
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Banjo's Backyard Farm

item.title: How we grow — our approach to permaculture
item.description:
Banjos Backyard Farm practices permaculture and sustainable small-scale farming. We focus on soil health, diverse plantings, and seasonal offerings including farm fresh eggs, berry shrubs, and tree plantings. Pickup available off State Route 203 in Monroe, WA.

Keywords: farm fresh eggs, permaculture, homestead, Monroe WA, local produce
